tagline: Nature's Finest Blooms, Curated For You
intro: We curate and deliver nature's most beautiful flowers, from timeless classics to rare exotic blooms, bringing the elegance of the garden to your door.

about.headline: The Art of Floral Curation
about.story: At David Flower Project, every bloom tells a story. Founded on a deep love for nature's artistry, we source the finest flowers from trusted growers around the world. Our collection spans the seasons — from the delicate anemones of early spring to the dramatic orchids of the tropics — each flower selected for its beauty, fragrance, and lasting quality.
about.philosophy: We do not simply sell flowers. We offer moments of beauty — one bloom at a time.

values.title: Quality
values.description: Every flower is hand-selected for freshness, color, and form — sourced only from the finest growers.

values.title: Variety
values.description: From seasonal classics to rare exotic blooms, our catalog spans four seasons and dozens of varieties.

values.title: Nature
values.description: We celebrate the natural beauty of flowers, offering arrangements that honor each bloom's unique character.

process.headline: From Garden to Your Door
process.subtitle: Five simple steps to bring nature's finest blooms to you.

steps.title: Browse Our Catalog
steps.description: Explore our curated collection of 50+ flower varieties spanning four seasons — from winter delicates to tropical exotics.

steps.title: Select Your Blooms
steps.description: Choose your flowers by stem or bunch. Each flower listing includes detailed descriptions and care instructions.

steps.title: Place Your Order
steps.description: Contact us via WhatsApp or our contact form. Our team will confirm availability and arrange delivery.

steps.title: Fresh Preparation
steps.description: Your flowers are freshly cut and carefully conditioned — stems trimmed, leaves stripped, and hydrated for maximum vase life.

steps.title: Delivered with Care
steps.description: Your blooms arrive beautifully wrapped, ready to brighten any space or occasion with nature's finest beauty.

contact.headline: Order Your Blooms
contact.subtitle: Same-day delivery available. Orders placed by noon.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to place a flower order with David Flower Project.
